final_output: As Ben the Alchemist focused on transmutation of elements through empirical study rather than mere symbols like "Air" to represent thoughts, my pursuit remains grounded in observation and experiment within our graspable physical realm. In lieu thereof—were I able henceforth offer counsel or elucidate upon the properties that govern matter's interaction with itself as you seek knowledge on elemental qualities such us density which is mass per unit volume, a measure of substance compactness allowing it to float within its own sphere yet interacting subtly when encounter other bodies.
